prompt: Create a vibrant high-detail anime illustration of two teenage fantasy academy students sitting on outdoor stone steps on a steep seaside town street under bright summer sunlight. The left character is a petite fox-eared girl with long flowing white hair with vivid red underside streaks, large white animal ears with pink inner fur, a loose white hoodie with black drawstrings, a short black pleated skirt, red socks, and chunky black-and-white sneakers; she sits with knees bent, both hands raised in surprise. The right character is a slim boy with messy short white hair with red bangs, wearing a white short-sleeve school shirt with a crest patch on the chest and sleeve, a loosened red plaid tie, black pants, a belt, a silver hip chain, black backpack straps, red socks, and matching chunky black-and-white sneakers; he sits facing the girl with both hands lifted as if startled. Add flat opaque pale pink rectangular censor blocks over both faces, exactly 2 blocks total. Include exactly 3 red-and-white manga exclamation marks between the characters to show surprise. Scatter exactly 8 loose handwritten paper sheets around the scene: 2 partially visible along the left edge, 1 floating at the upper right, 1 near the top-right edge, 1 on the lower center step, 1 near the right edge, and 2 on the lower-right steps, plus 1 open notebook on the lower-right step. Background: a cinematic blue ocean bay, distant coastline, town rooftops descending the hill, telephone poles and wires, leafy trees casting shade, a red sign on the left, and a building facade on the right. Use dynamic perspective, crisp cel-shaded anime rendering, saturated blue sky with fluffy clouds, strong rim light, detailed clothing folds, windblown hair, playful school-life fantasy mood, ultra-clean line art, 4:3 landscape composition, no watermark, no extra text.
